introSection: Big Dipper is a steel roller coaster located in Australia. It operates at the annual Royal Adelaide Show, where it replaced the Mad Mouse which has since been relocated to Indonesia.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has a single vertical loop.

sections.title: Notes
sections.content: While listed as a Pinfari roller coaster, but was built after the Pinfari company ceased operations and thus was probably built by Interpark. This roller coaster was manufactured in Romania in 2008.

fullText:
Big Dipper is a steel roller coaster located in Australia. It operates at the annual Royal Adelaide Show, where it replaced the Mad Mouse which has since been relocated to Indonesia.

The ride has a single vertical loop.



While listed as a Pinfari roller coaster, but was built after the Pinfari company ceased operations and thus was probably built by Interpark. This roller coaster was manufactured in Romania in 2008.
